hero.headline: Show up.Lift heavy.Leave taller.
hero.subtext: Coached classes from 6:00 to 20:00, six days a week. No mirrors on the lifting floor, no lock-in contracts, chalk included.

items.title: Iron Hour
items.desc: Barbell strength in 8-week waves: squat, press, deadlift. Percentages on the whiteboard, a coach on your rack, video

items.title: Engine Room
items.desc: Forty minutes of intervals on sleds, rowers, and bikes. Heart-rate zones, not heroics: you finish tired, not broken

items.title: Box Fundamentals
items.desc: Footwork, guard, and combinations on pads and bags. No sparring until Coach Cole says your jab has earned it, usually

items.desc: Twelve years coaching barbells, from first-timers to a national masters medalist. Runs Iron Hour and writes every

items.desc: Cornered 200+ amateur bouts before hanging up the towel to teach. Runs Box Fundamentals and the Engine Room, and will

about.body: TorqueShine Detailing is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Foam Wash
features: Deep clean without a single swirl mark.

items.name: Interior Detailing
features: Seats, carpets and vents like new.

items.a: Yes — same-day callouts when urgency demands it.
Quotes are free within our service area.
We cover the city and nearby neighbourhoods.
